title: Lit It Up
description: Furnaces won't light up unless the player interacts with them.
body:
###

Realistic Furnace Ignition


Want a little more realism in your survival? With this mod, you have to light your furnaces yourself. No more magic flames, your furnace needs a tiny bit of attention.




Manual furnace lighting with flexible ignition options. Works with vanilla and many modded blocks, supports custom ignition items, reacts to the environment (fire, rain), and adds a simple early game progression using natural finds.


###

Getting Started


Find Switchgrass. It looks like normal grass, but with a warmer yellow green tint. Its color shifts with the biome and it grows over time from Stage 1 to Stage 3.



**Harvesting** - **Stage 1**: leave it alone (no fiber yet) - **Stage 2**: drops **1 Switchgrass Fiber** - **Stage 3**: drops **1 Switchgrass Fiber** with a **40% chance** for **+1 extra**
**Ignition** - **Sparkling Flint**: crafted with **Switchgrass Fiber** and consumes fiber when used - **Flint and Steel**: works without fiber - **Configured items** (optional): add more ignition items via the mod's **configuration**


Put the right ingredients and fuel inside the furnace, then ignite it to start cooking. It runs until the flame goes out. If you are low on fiber, try to keep the flame going so you have to relight less often. Your furnace is basically a tiny campfire with responsibilities in case you need it.


**For modpack creators** Use the **Bookling Gear** configuration menu to tweak **Sparkling Flint requirements**, manage the **ignition item list**, toggle **Switchgrass world generation**, and adjust many other options to fit your pack.

###

Special types of ignition


The mod also adds three special ignition methods.


- **Double Flint Ignition**. Hold flint in both hands and make sure the fuel slot contains **Switchgrass Fiber** or **Baled Switchgrass**. Then right click to strike and ignite. **(Disabled by default in config)** - **Golden Lighter**. With the **Curios** mod installed, you can equip and use the special interaction of the **Golden Lighter** item. It lights the furnace no matter what you are holding. Just make sure the furnace has the right **ingredients** and **fuel**. - **Fire Aspect**. Any item with the **Fire Aspect** enchantment can ignite the furnace. It costs **1 durability**, or **1 item** if it is stackable.


###

Environmental Ignitions


Furnaces can also ignite from the environment, depending on where you place them.


- Place a furnace over **lava**, **fire**, any other **configured hot block**, or a block in its **lit state**. It will ignite **automatically** like vanilla, and **no ignition item is needed**. - If the furnace is **exposed to rain** during rain or thunder, this method is disabled and you must light it manually.


###

Guide Book


If you get lost, open the Guide Book on the right side of the compatible furnace GUIs.

It shows quick tips for the current block, including how to ignite and a few extra notes.

If you do not see the "LIT" banner, that furnace may not be supported or compatibility is disabled.


###

Advancements


Want a more natural progression? Check the advancements. They guide you through the mod step by step and help you learn by playing, not by guessing.


###

Extra


Campfires and selected compatible modded blocks are placed in their unlit form.

Light them after placing using your ignition items. You can disable this in the Bookling Gear settings.


###

Available Mod Compatibilities


Click to check the compatibility list - [**Furnace Mk2**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/furnace-mk2) (1.19.2) - [**Brick Furnace**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/brick-furnace) (1.19.2 - 1.20.1) - [**Iron Furnaces**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/iron-furnaces) (1.19.2 - 1.20.1) - [**Better Furnaces Reforged**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-furnaces-reforged) (1.19.2 - 1.20.4) - [**Immersive Engineering**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-engineering) (1.19.2 - 1.19.4) - [**The Aether**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aether) (1.19.2 - 1.20.1) - [**Farmer's Delight**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-delight) (1.19.2 - 1.20.1 except 1.19.4) - [**Overgeared**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/overgeared) (1.20.1) - [**Tough As Nails**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tough-as-nails) (1.19.2 - 1.20.4) - [**Candlelight**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lets-do-candlelight) (1.19.2 - 1.20.1 except 1.19.4) - [**Crock Pot**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/crock-pot) (1.20.1)

More compatibilities coming soon!


简体中文说明 / Simplified Chinese
###

真实熔炉点火


想让你的生存模式多一点真实感 吗？有了这个模组 你 必须亲自点燃 你的熔炉. 不再有魔法般自动燃起的火焰，你的熔炉需要一点点用心照料。




手动点燃熔炉，并提供灵活的点火方式。可兼容原版及多种模组方块，支持自定义点火物品，会对环境（火焰、雨水）作出反应，并通过自然资源加入简洁的前期发展流程。


###

开始使用


寻找荆草。它看起来像普通的草，但带有更温暖的黄绿色调。它的颜色会随生物群系变化，并且会随着时间生长，从阶段 1 生长到阶段 3。



**收获方式** - **阶段 1**:不要破坏（尚不会掉落纤维） - **阶段 2**: 掉落 **1 个荆草纤维** - **阶段 3**: 掉落 **1 个荆草纤维** 并有 **40% 概率** 额外获得 **+1 个**
**点火** - **闪光燧石** 由 **荆草纤维** 合成，使用时会消耗纤维 - **燧石与钢**: 无需纤维即可使用 - **可配置物品** （可选）：可通过模组的 **配置** 添加更多点火物品


将正确的材料与燃料放入熔炉中，然后点燃它开始烧炼。它会持续运作，直到火焰熄灭。如果你的纤维不多，尽量保持火焰持续燃烧，这样就不用频繁重新点火。需要时，你的熔炉就像一个肩负职责的小型营火。


**给整合包作者** 使用 **Bookling Gear** 的配置菜单来调整 **闪光燧石需求**，管理 **点火物品列表**，切换 **荆草世界生成**

###

特殊点火方式


该模组还增加了 三种特殊点火方式。


- **双燧石点火**。双手各持燧石，并确保燃料栏中有 **荆草纤维** 或 **荆草捆**。然后右键点击即可击打点燃。**（默认在配置中禁用）** - **金色打火机**。安装 **Curios** 模组后，可以装备并使用 **金色打火机** 的特殊交互效果。无论手中持有什么，都能点燃熔炉。只需确保熔炉中有正确的 **材料** 和 **燃料**。 - **火焰附加**。任何带有 **火焰附加** 附魔的物品都可以点燃熔炉。消耗 **1 点耐久**，如果可堆叠则消耗 **1 个物品** 。


###

环境点火


熔炉也可以根据放置位置从 环境 中点燃。


- 将熔炉放置在 **岩浆**， **火焰**、任何其他 **配置的高温方块**或处于 **点燃状态** 的方块上。它会像原版一样 **自动点燃，无需点火物品**。 - 如果熔炉在雨天或雷雨中 **暴露在雨中** ，此方法将失效，必须手动点燃。


###

指南书


如果迷路了，可以打开兼容熔炉界面右侧的 指南书。

它会显示当前方块的快速提示，包括 如何点燃 以及一些额外说明。

如果没有看到 “LIT” 标识，该熔炉可能不被 支持，或者 兼容性已禁用。


###

进度


想要更自然的进度体验？查看 进度。它们会一步步引导你使用模组，让你通过实际操作学习，而不是靠猜测。


###

额外内容


营火 以及部分兼容的模组方块在放置时为 未点燃状态。

放置后使用你的 点火物品 点燃它们。你可以在 Bookling Gear 设置中禁用此功能。


###

可用模组兼容列表


  点击查看兼容性列表 - [**Furnace Mk2**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/furnace-mk2) (1.19.2) - [**Brick Furnace**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/brick-furnace) (1.19.2 - 1.20.1) - [**Iron Furnaces**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/iron-furnaces) (1.19.2 - 1.20.1) - [**Better Furnaces Reforged**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-furnaces-reforged) (1.19.2 - 1.20.4) - [**Immersive Engineering**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-engineering) (1.19.2 - 1.19.4) - [**The Aether**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aether) (1.19.2 - 1.20.1) - [**Farmer's Delight**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-delight) (1.19.2 - 1.20.1 except 1.19.4) - [**Overgeared**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/overgeared) (1.20.1) - [**Tough As Nails**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tough-as-nails) (1.19.2 - 1.20.4) - [**Candlelight**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lets-do-candlelight) (1.19.2 - 1.20.1 except 1.19.4) - [**Crock Pot**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/crock-pot) (1.20.1)

更多兼容内容即将推出！



Hi there! Enjoyed this mod? Here are a few more you might like. 😊
